Name: HWiNFO Sensors
Author: Stephen Lawrensen
Description: Live HWiNFO sensor readings on your Stream Deck — temperatures, clocks, fan speeds, voltages, power and usage, rendered with seven display themes, sensor-type accents, warn/critical alert colors, sparklines and stat modes, plus Stream Deck + dial and touchscreen support. Requires HWiNFO with Shared Memory Support or Gadget reporting enabled; auto mode picks the best available source and recovers on its own when HWiNFO restarts.

Actions.Name: Sensor Reading
Actions.Tooltip: Display a live HWiNFO sensor reading on a key, with thresholds and sparkline.

Actions.Name: Sensor Dial
Actions.Tooltip: Show a HWiNFO sensor on the touchscreen. Rotate to switch readings, press to reset session min/max.
